name: Shrimp Ala Vip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the first four ingredients. Cook over low heat, stirring until thickened.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add sherry and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Arrange shrimp and artichoke hearts or broccoli in an 8x8-inch buttered baking dish.
5. Saute mushrooms in butter and spread over the artichoke hearts.
6. Pour cream sauce over the ingredients in the baking dish.
7. Sprinkle generously with Parmesan cheese and lightly with paprika.
8. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes at 375 degrees.
